form.formComment: Flew the lids with a strong early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by 5.5 lengths over 390m at Shepparton (22.02). The last win was in one of the quickest times on the card. Stick with her.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Has placed the last couple. Ran 25.81 when third at Q Lakeside latest but the run prior he recorded a powerful 19.72 over 366m finishing second at Capalaba. Has the ability and looks an each way chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start was checked.

form.formComment: Hit the frame at this track last time when a 2 length third but did record a solid 23.99 over the 425m trip. Hard to top with a repeat of that run.

form.formComment: Finished third at big odds last time (30.22) over 515m at Sandown. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Looks tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: Eye-catching performance leading throughout to score by 1.3 lengths in a Free For All last start at Warrnambool, recording a dominant 21.95 over the 390m journey. In form and rates on top again.

form.formComment: Strong performance to post a big 4 lengths win at Warragul over 460m (26.26) beating Mighty Heighty in Grade 5 on April 10. Others hold stronger claims.

form.formComment: Had been in solid form before missing the frame at the latest appearance when fourth (22.40) at Shepparton. Has a solid record from out wide but needs to bounce back.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 5th in a Grade 5 FIN on April 6 over 390m at Shepparton behind Ripped Paige beaten 10 lengths (22.53). Placed two back at Geelong. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Geelong over 400m in 22.67. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when eighth over 390m at Shepparton at Grade 5 level. Prepared to just watch this time.
